arts.ttl: Arsenal and Man City 'join the race for 18-year-old Norwegian wonderkid' - with the midfielder 'jetting into Manchester for talks' this evening
arts.sum: Man City and Arsenal are set to fight for an 18-year-old Norwegian wonderkid, with the midfielder landing in Manchester on Friday night, according to multiple reports.

arts.ttl: 'Where do I start' - Kyle Walker breaks silence after sealing AC Milan loan move from Man City
arts.sum: Kyle Walker has left Manchester City for AC Milan on an initial loan deal

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Man City captain Kyle Walker completes AC Milan transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City captain Kyle Walker has joined AC Milan on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Man Utd could target Nkunku as Chelsea consider Garnacho offer
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku has emerged as a potential Manchester United target in this window as Chelsea consider making a move for United forward Alejandro Garnacho.
